title: 修复归档证据导致的 no-active 状态漂移

sources.reason: No-active status generation incorrectly counted uncommitted archive evidence.
No-active consistency must apply the same archive-evidence exclusion.
Regression coverage for generated status filtering.

riskAssessment.reason: Generation and validation must use the same explicit exclusion for uncommitted archive evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The fix is deterministic and covered by regression tests.

preReviewWarnings: Do not hide ordinary source changes; exclude only .ai/work-items/archive evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: No-active status generation ignores only uncommitted archive evidence.
Status consistency and ownership checks use the same rule and regressions are covered by tests.
Full project and AI checks pass and the Work Item is archived.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Archiving creates uncommitted evidence files before commit, causing no-active status to report a false ambiguous worktree.
constraints: Use the same filter in generator and checker.
Continue auditing archive paths through ownership and PR gates.
intent.rationale: This resolves the lifecycle contradiction without weakening ordinary no-active change detection.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Uncommitted archive Contract/Summary evidence does not make no-active status ambiguous before commit.
Ordinary uncommitted source changes still fail no-active consistency.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
